flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (63.6% → 52.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South College rose 91% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6k → 8.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at South College rose 54% between 2021 and 2024 (32.4% → 50.0%).
